## Task

What public profile / portfolio / proof-index action should be done?

## Why it matters

What does this improve for reviewers, users, or sponsors?

## Evidence needed

- [ ] README / docs update
- [ ] link verification
- [ ] sensitive-pattern check
- [ ] CI pass
- [ ] issue / discussion / release link if relevant

## Notes

Do not paste private workspace paths, app IDs, open IDs, chat IDs, message IDs, or raw live integration output.
